name: Beet Soup with Dill & Yogurt
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan over low heat.
2. Add onions and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 12 minutes.
3. Add beets and cook, covered, for about 35 minutes, stirring occasionally until the beets are falling apart.
4. Add stock and salt. Cover and bring to boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Strain the soup and reserve the liquid.
7. Transfer the beets to a blender or food processor and puree until smooth.
8. Return the puree to the pan and add the reserved liquid.
9. Pour the hot soup into a tureen and serve in bowls in front of guests, decorating each bowl with 2 tablespoons yogurt and sprinkling with chopped dill.
